description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head and glasses, standing with arms slightly outstretched. His upper body is bare, revealing multiple tattoos on his chest, arms, and back, including a large symbol on his back and various text and images on his chest. He is wearing tight, dark pants with a visible waistband and no shirt or upper garment. The figure's feet are bare, and his body is anatomically proportionate, with visible muscle definition. The skin tone is light, and the overall appearance suggests a casual, urban pedestrian. The figure's facial features are detailed, and the tattoos add a distinctive, personalized touch.
description: Bald adult male with glasses, bare-chested and tattooed, wearing tight dark pants and standing barefoot with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, glasses, chest tattoos, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and the side of the pants.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a large tattoo on the back and the rear of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and the side of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: tight pants with a visible waistband
